name: SKUFS AND ALT-GIRLS
short_description: Alt-girl simulator in the form of tamagotchi and a visual novel with immersion in the Russian atmosphere!
detailed_description:
"Skufs and Alt-girls" is a tamagotchi game in which you have to try on the role of a girl assistant and take care of after a man.

Ah, have you not heard about this new profession? In short, the Ministry of Social Development has developed a program to support single men over forty years who have not been realized in life. They were called Skufs. It took a lot of girls to implement the program and their task was to help those men.

Game Features:

- 5 playable characters, which means 5 stories!
- Tamagotchi mechanics: take care of the scoof and put it in order.
- Lots of exciting mini-games, like tanks! Well, what kind of game about Scythians without tanks?
- built-in Internet;
- stock exchange;
- vampire like about Rus and Lizards;
- references to memes;
- and much, much more!
